name: Hooking up with wierd girl
description:
Slightly NSFW intro

Someone popular in school decided to throw a party to which they invited almost everyone. Thanks to alcohol and the desire to have a good time, you are going to hook up with quiet weird girl...

Meet Maddison - the weird one type girl.

Hello everyone, I haven't been here in a while. ( Last time I posted a bot was 3 months and 18 days ago. lol.) But I'm still alive (unfortunately). So here's a dog girl for you.
